compiled_state.title: [test-batched]: SIGURG exit 144 kills batch manager despite timeout:600000 on Bash tool call
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Incident Overview
test-batched.sh is specifically designed to avoid SIGURG timeouts by running tests in 50-second batches and resuming via state file across Bash tool calls. However, the script itself is receiving SIGURG (exit code 144) on each invocation, even when the Bash tool call has timeout: 600000 set. This defeats the entire purpose of test-batched — instead of protecting against the ~73s tool ceiling, the tool is still being killed after completing only 1-3 tests per invocation. Observed during commit workflow test step for fix of bfba-58f3: repeated 144 exits with only 1-3 tests completing per batch call.
